---
title: "Blog"
description: "Practical tutorials and methodological deep dives into A/B testing, causal inference, SQL, and Python from the perspective of an applied economist."
body-classes: hide-title-block
listing:
  contents: posts
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: cloud
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
# title-block-banner: true
---
